title: Es muss nicht immer Kaviar sein
director: Géza von Radványi, Helmut Käutner, Georg Marischka
writer: Johannes Mario Simmel, Henri Jeanson, Jean Ferry
actors: O.W. Fischer, Eva Bartok, Senta Berger
plot: Bank accountant Thomas Lieven is forced to work as a triple agent for the British, the French and the Nazis.
